instructions: Read wiki/_hot.md to load recent session context.
Read wiki/_index.md for orientation on what's in the wiki.

Find the page with the oldest last_updated date that has status: active and at least one related page. Surface it for revisiting: 'Revisit: [[page-name]] hasn't been touched in X days. Still accurate? Any new connections?'
Ask the human: 'What are we working on today — ingesting sources, asking questions, or something else?'
Summarize this session: what was ingested, what was queried, what pages were created or updated, what's still open.
Update wiki/_hot.md: move 'Current Session' content to 'Previous Session', move 'Previous Session' to 'Two Sessions Ago', discard anything older. Write the new session summary into 'Current Session'.
If any tasks or questions were left unfinished, note them in the 'Current Session' section of _hot.md so they carry over.
